---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new dashboard, view, or capability for Cast Desktop
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What Problem Are You Trying to Solve?

Describe the gap or pain point. E.g., "I have to jump between Cast Desktop and the terminal to...", or "There's no way to see...", or "It would be faster if I could...".

## Proposed Solution

What should Cast Desktop do that it doesn't today? Be as specific as you can.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches have you thought about or already tried?

## Additional Context

- Is this related to a specific CAST component (agents, hooks, memory, plans, token spend)?
- Would this feature help new users understand CAST better?
- Any sketches, mockups, or prototypes?

## Are You Willing to Help Build This?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to contribute
- [ ] Maybe, happy to pair or review
- [ ] No, just a suggestion

If yes or maybe, we can sketch the approach together in an issue discussion or PR.
